results.description: craft-profile.schema.md protocol mismatch and ghost agent
results.evidence: craft-profile.schema.md now declares writeProtocol='create-once', sole writer='romantic-fantasy-writer-craft-profile-selector'. No reference to plot-architect. Matches architecture.json exactly.

results.description: chapters/{N}/draft.md protocol and writer count mismatch
results.evidence: Both architecture.json and chapters.schema.md now declare writeProtocol='read-modify-write' with 4 writers in sequential order: chapter-drafter→pov-voice-maintainer→continuity-integrator→craft-enforcer. multiWriterRules documented with pipeline order and reset-on-retry behavior.
grep -r 'plot-architect' across all schema files returns zero hits. Ghost agent fully removed.

results.description: Result code table misattribution in agent-as-function-contract skill
results.evidence: revision-required now correctly attributed as 'beta-synthesizer (data field in synthesis output, surfaced by beta-reading-coordinator)'. revision-loop now correctly attributed to 'All phase coordinators (8) — orchestrator consumes this code for cross-phase routing'.

results.description: README.md priority level summary had wrong counts
results.evidence: README.md priority table now reads: P0=7 scenarios, P1=16 scenarios, P2=3 scenarios. Matches test-plan.json. Total=26.
grep -ic 'ralph' in mcp-sidecar/SKILL.md returns 0. External reference fully removed.

comparisonToCycle1.notes: Cycle 2 total check count differs slightly from cycle 1 (1331 vs 1326) due to minor check structure differences. All agent checks pass. All 6 gap fixes verified.
